heading: Reimbursement for loss of personal effects by natural disaster
label: 1726 Reimbursement for loss of personal effects by natural disaster
text: The Secretary shall, under regulations which the Secretary shall prescribe, reimburse veterans in Department hospitals and domiciliaries for any loss of personal effects sustained by fire, earthquake, or other natural disaster while such effects were stored in designated locations in Department hospitals or domiciliaries.
notes: Prior ProvisionsPrior section 1726, , , , provided for control by agencies of United States, prior to repeal by , , . See .Pub. L. 85–85772 Stat. 1197Pub. L. 89–358, § 3(a)(3)80 Stat. 20section 3689 of this titleSept. 2, 1958Mar. 3, 1966

Amendments1991—, renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–83, § 5(a)section 626 of this title, (2)(E), substituted “Secretary” for “Administrator” in two places.Pub. L. 102–83, § 4(b)(1), (4), substituted “Department” for “Veterans’ Administration” in two places.Pub. L. 102–83, § 4(a)(3)1976— substituted “the Administrator shall prescribe” for “he shall prescribe”.Pub. L. 94–5811973— substituted “natural disaster” for “fire” in section catchline and extended reimbursement provisions to earthquake and other natural disasters also.Pub. L. 93–82
